message:
feat: bundled Pragmasevka Nerd Font with auto-install and ft setup font command

Embeds the Pragmasevka Nerd Font v1.7.0 as a zstd-compressed zip payload
(~7.9MB) in the ft binary, with automatic installation on first run and
an explicit `ft setup font` subcommand for manual control.

Font installation system (main.rs):
- `decode_bundled_pragmasevka_zip()`: decompresses the embedded zstd
  payload and verifies SHA-256 integrity of both the compressed and
  decompressed data against hardcoded manifests.
- `install_bundled_pragmasevka()`: extracts .ttf files from the zip,
  writes them to the platform font directory, validates all expected
  files are present, and writes a version marker file.
- `default_font_install_dir()`: platform-aware font directory detection
  for macOS (~/Library/Fonts), Linux (~/.local/share/fonts), and
  Windows (AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows/Fonts).
- `ensure_default_bundled_font()`: auto-installs on normal ft startup,
  skipped during `ft version`, `ft setup --dry-run`, and
  `ft setup font` (which has its own explicit flow).
- `run_setup_font_command()`: handles `ft setup font [--apply] [--force]
  [--dir PATH]` with dry-run preview, force-reinstall, and custom
  directory support.
- `refresh_linux_font_cache()`: runs `fc-cache -f` on Linux after
  install for immediate font availability.
- Guided setup (`run_guided_setup`) now includes a Phase 5 font
  installation step before SSH host detection (now Phase 6).

Distributed agent reconnect refactor (main.rs):
- Extracted `distributed_agent_next_reconnect_backoff_ms()` helper from
  inline reconnect logic in `distributed_agent_stream_forever`, removing
  a redundant `mark_disconnected()` call that was resetting backoff state
  before `mark_reconnecting()` could escalate it.
- New test `distributed_agent_reconnect_backoff_escalates_until_connect`
  verifies the 500→1000→2000ms backoff escalation and reset on connect.

Font tests (main.rs):
- CLI flag parsing for `ft setup font --force --dir`.
- `should_auto_install_bundled_font` respects version/dry-run/font commands.
- Embedded payload SHA-256 matches manifest constants.
- Bundled archive contains all four expected .ttf files.
- Detection requires all expected files present (partial = not installed).

WezTerm config integration (setup.rs):
- `generate_ssh_domains_lua()` now emits a `font_with_fallback` block
  defaulting to Pragmasevka NF with JetBrainsMono and Symbols Nerd Font
  Mono fallbacks, guarded by `if config.font == nil` to respect
  user-defined font overrides.
- Updated setup tests to verify font_with_fallback block presence.
- Setup command help text updated to reflect new subcommand names
  (config/shell/font instead of shell-hooks/lua-domain).

Dependencies (Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock):
- Added sha2 (SHA-256 hashing), zip (archive extraction), and zstd
  (decompression) to the frankenterm binary crate.

README.md:
- Added note about bundled Pragmasevka font auto-installation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -203,6 +203,9 @@ cargo install --git https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm.git ft
 ```bash
 # Guided setup (generates config snippets and shell hooks)
 ft setup
+
+# Bundled Pragmasevka Nerd Font auto-installs on normal ft usage
+# and generated wezterm config defaults to it automatically.
 ```
 
 ### 2. Verify Terminal Backend Connectivity

@@ -34,6 +34,9 @@ toml_edit.workspace = true
 toon_rust.workspace = true
 rusqlite.workspace = true
 dirs = "6.0.0"
+sha2.workspace = true
+zip.workspace = true
+zstd.workspace = true
 fastmcp = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 asupersync = { workspace = true, features = ["tls"] }
